zh.lifeSummary: 當Otes L Arcedekne於大約1217年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可門德萊善姆時，她的父親Michael L' Arcedekne40歲，母親Mrs Michael I'Arcedenke35歲。她和Otto FitzWilliam至少有2個兒子。她去世於大約1277年享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Otes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a patronymic derived from the genitive case of the medieval given name Ote or Ode (of Norman, and ultimately Germanic, origin; compare Odette ). In northern England the medieval given name survived into the 19th century. It came to be used as a given name in America in honour of the Revolutionary hero James Otis ( 1725–83 ); in modern times it has been bestowed in honour of the American soul singer Otis Redding ( 1941–67 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Otes L Arcedekne was born about 1217, in Mendlesham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Michael L' Arcedekne, was 40 and her mother, Mrs Michael I'Arcedenke, was 35. She had at least 2 sons with Otto FitzWilliam. She died about 1277, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otes L Arcedekne est née environ 1217, à Mendlesham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Michael L' Arcedekne, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mrs Michael I'Arcedenke, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Otto FitzWilliam. Elle est décédée environ 1277, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otes L Arcedekne um 1217 in Mendlesham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Michael L' Arcedekne 40 und ihre Mutter Mrs Michael I'Arcedenke 35. Sie hatte mit Otto FitzWilliam mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1277 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otes L Arcedekne è nata il circa 1217 nel Mendlesham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Michael L' Arcedekne, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Mrs Michael I'Arcedenke, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Otto FitzWilliam. Morì circa 1277, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Otes L Arcedekneが約1217年にイギリスイギリススフォルクメンドレシャムで生まれた時，父Michael L' Arcedekneは40歳，母Mrs Michael I'Arcedenkeは35歳であった。彼女はOtto FitzWilliamとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1277年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otes L Arcedekne(이)가 대략 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 멘들레샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Michael L' Arcedekne(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Michael I'Arcedenke(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Otto FitzWilliam(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1277년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otes L Arcedekne nasceu aproximadamente 1217, em Mendlesham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Michael L' Arcedekne, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Michael I'Arcedenke, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Otto FitzWilliam. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1277, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otes L Arcedekne родилась около 1217 г. в местности мендлешам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Michael L' Arcedekne было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Michael I'Arcedenke, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Otto FitzWilliam. Она умерла около 1277 г. в возрасте 62 лет.
